title: WalletStore built but never wired to in-memory sessions map
description: wallet/src/db.rs ships WalletStore with upsert_session/all_sessions. The in-memory sessions HashMap in chat() is acknowledged as non-persistent ('persisted to wallet DB in nie-z5x; for now lives only in memory'). But WalletStore is never instantiated or called from chat(). Consequence: payment sessions are lost on restart; users can see a payment they initiated disappear without trace. Trigger: any /pay session followed by Ctrl-C and restart. The DB code is tested in isolation but the integration gap means the feature silently regresses to in-memory-only.
